message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_V="$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo "=== Check the remaining missing ports (esd signals) ==="
python3 - << 'PYEOF'
# Check pad_a_esd_0_h and pad_a_noesd_h - also in missing list
with open("/tmp/missing_ports.txt") as f:
    missing = set(f.read().strip().split())
esd = [p for p in missing if 'esd' in p.lower() or 'noesd' in p.lower()]
print(f"ESD ports in missing list: {esd}")
amux = [p for p in missing if 'amuxbus' in p.lower()]
print(f"Amuxbus ports: {len(amux)}")
PYEOF

echo ""
echo "=== Apply patch: backup original, install patched ==="
cp "$WRAPPER_V" "${WRAPPER_V}.original_backup"
cp "${WRAPPER_V}.patched" "$WRAPPER_V"
echo "Patched wrapper.v installed"
echo "New port count in wrapper.v:"
grep -c "    inout\|    input\|    output" "$WRAPPER_V"
